subcodes.title: Words to some clergymen, spoken on 1912-04-13
subcodes.first_line: Materialism and spirituality have always kept pace together. Now materialism has gone ahead, the divine foundation is forgotten and is being left behind.... The appearance of the divine Manifestation is like the coming of springtime.
subcodes.first_line_orig: مادیات و روحانیات همیشه همعنان بوده ولی حال مادیات غلبه نموده و اساس الهی فراموش شده
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @harmony of science and religion, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @blind imitation [taqlid], @spiritual springtime
